reviews.review_description: This simulation, and others alike will change the way we learn, the way you can interact with everything, and solve real time problems, is truly amazing. Please continue upgrading this, ITS THE FUTRE!

Hi shirantash,

reviews.review_description: This is a great opportunity to increase reps in the OR and enhance familiarity. Excited to see how this grows and enhances the learning experience!
